title: eriogonum heermannii var. humilius
intro: Eriogonum heermannii var. humilius, also known as Heermann's buckwheat or dwarf Heermann's buckwheat, is a flowering plant species in the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). It is native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico, where it grows in dry, rocky areas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eriogonum heermannii var. humilius include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, and it can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for herbal use.
